parents.subject: LU-17431 nodemap: fileset inheritance for dynamic nodemap

commit.subject: LU-0000 misc: remove read/write_iter compat (test)
commit.message:
LU-0000 misc: remove read/write_iter compat (test)

Lustre no longer supports kernels that do not have
read/write_iter file operations. Remove the backwards
compat code needed to support them.

PCC tests keep failing???

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Timothy Day <timday@amazon.com>
Change-Id: I60f21763d842b5194842c1dee9e0e34e52c1d67e
